name: Brown Rice & Vegetable Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the onion and garlic in olive oil until soft and golden.
2. Stir in the rice until coated evenly with the oil.
3. Add the vegetable stock, salt, and turmeric. Bring to a boil and simmer for about 40 minutes. The rice should be tender and all the liquid absorbed.
4. While the rice is cooking, prepare the vegetables: cut the beans into small chunks and steam them in boiling salted water until tender (about 5-7 minutes). Drain well.
5. Cool the rice and vegetables, then mix together with the bell pepper.
6. Stir in half the nuts and place in a serving bowl.
7. Sprinkle the remaining nuts on top.
8. Serve with an oil and vinegar dressing if desired.
Mary Norwak, "Grains, Beans & Pulses"
